name: IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS
description: IRC_IS_INTERVIEWS will contain all the interview slots information

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_INTERVIEW_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key for this table.

columns.Name: MEETING_HOST_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the value of meeting host for the interview. Selected named person or team member type as meeting host. Lookup to use ORA_HIRINGMANAGER or ORA_HIRING_TEAM_COLLABORATOR or ORA_RECRUITER or ORA_IS_HOST

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_MEETING_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Stores the value of the meeting provider for the interview

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated submission(IRC_SUBMISSIONS) for this schedule.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated schedule(IRC_IS_SCHEDULES_B) for this schedule.

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_NOTES
columns.Comments: Interview notes for the candidate

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_GUIDELINES
columns.Comments: Provides the interview guidelines

columns.Name: IS_SCHEDULED
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when the time proposal is used by a candidate.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The start date for the planned interview.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The end date for the planned interview.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the schedule location. (IRC_IS_LOCATIONS)

columns.Name: LAST_REMINDER_DATE
columns.Comments: Last time that the interview reminder message was sent through ESS job.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OFFICE365_USER_ID
columns.Comments: The Microsoft Active Directory user id that was used to create the calendar event. This user is also the organizer for this event.

columns.Name: OFFICE365_CALENDAR_ID
columns.Comments: The calendar id that was used to create the calendar event for the scheduled interview.

columns.Name: OFFICE365_CALENDAR_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: The calendar event of the calendar event that was created for the interview.

columns.Name: OFFICE365_CAL_EV_IMMUTABLE_ID
columns.Comments: The calendar event immutable id of the calendar event that was created for the interview

columns.Name: OFFICE365_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last update in Office 365

columns.Name: OFFICE365_LAST_SYNC_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last synchronization with Office 365

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: ESS job request Id that retrieved the latest information from Office 365

columns.Name: TOTAL_SEATS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of seats available for the candidates to schedule an interview for this interview slot.

columns.Name: IS_COMPLETED
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y once the interview is completed.

columns.Name: MEETING_LINK_URL
columns.Comments: Stores the meeting join link URL.

columns.Name: MEETING_HTTP_CONTENT
columns.Comments: Stores HTTP content for the online meeting event

columns.Name: ZOOM_MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: The meeting ID of the Zoom meeting

columns.Name: GOOGLE_USER_ID
columns.Comments: Google user that was used to create the calendar event. This user is also the organizer for this event.

columns.Name: GOOGLE_CALENDAR_ID
columns.Comments: The Google calendar id that was used to create the calendar event for the scheduled interview.

columns.Name: GOOGLE_CALENDAR_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: The Google calendar event of the calendar event that was created for the interview.

columns.Name: GOOGLE_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last update in Google.

columns.Name: GOOGLE_LAST_SYNC_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last synchronization with Google.
